case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. ERLINDA S PARNAY et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-13-2007 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUN-08-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT PARNAY, ERLINDA S ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $980.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $980.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
